title: OmNom
description: Just fun mod for fans of OmNom :D
body:
## With OmNom Mod, you'll embark on a sugary adventure like never before.

![OmNom is here](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QRn1AvJL/images/3fec55464bf1a77d2b81b032908ed7d7bd428ab5.png)

![Candy Hunter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QRn1AvJL/images/4dbeb6f7272fc181657b3e84cd0191fd4fe23447.png)

Trade your collected candies with OmNom for a variety of enticing items that will enhance your gaming experience. Whether you're in the mood for cute mobs, rare resources, or delicious candy, OmNom has something interesting for you.

---

![Alt text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QRn1AvJL/images/bc5c99a1ebd8307984874cfaaeb004bda4c8644a.png)

![Alt text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QRn1AvJL/images/4dbeb6f7272fc181657b3e84cd0191fd4fe23447.png)

If you think that everything is complicated here, then it is not! All crafts are very simple and easy to remember :P

---

![Alt text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QRn1AvJL/images/f372661e949650eb8091851ea9b44c4e619b900f.png)

---

Also you can join our [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/XZKeXxMDp8) to know about future updates

Have a good day :)
